'''thazugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabaconid|sabaconid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabaconid|sabaconid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thazugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzigith|thæzigith]] || [[word:thæzigij|thæzigij]] || [[word:thæzigish|thæzigish]] || [[word:thæzigi|thæzigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazuzuguth|thazuzuguth]] || [[word:thazuzuguj|thazuzuguj]] || [[word:thazuzugush|thazuzugush]] || [[word:thazuzugu|thazuzugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazuguth|thazuguth]] || [[word:thazuguj|thazuguj]] || [[word:thazugush|thazugush]] || [[word:thazugu|thazugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazufguth|thazufguth]] || [[word:thazufguj|thazufguj]] || [[word:thazufgush|thazufgush]] || [[word:thazufguf|thazufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazuguthu|thazuguthu]] || [[word:thazuguju|thazuguju]] || [[word:thazugushu|thazugushu]] || [[word:thazuguku|thazuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazuguth|thazuguth]] || [[word:thazuguj|thazuguj]] || [[word:thazugush|thazugush]] || [[word:thazugu|thazugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazuguthul|thazuguthul]] || [[word:thazugujul|thazugujul]] || [[word:thazugushul|thazugushul]] || [[word:thazugukul|thazugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazuguthuthu|thazuguthuthu]] || [[word:thazugujuju|thazugujuju]] || [[word:thazugushushu|thazugushushu]] || [[word:thazuguku|thazuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazuguthun|thazuguthun]] || [[word:thazugujun|thazugujun]] || [[word:thazugushun|thazugushun]] || [[word:thazugukun|thazugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazuguthuoro|thazuguthuoro]] || [[word:thazugujuoro|thazugujuoro]] || [[word:thazugushuoro|thazugushuoro]] || [[word:thazugukuoro|thazugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
